instruction: I am doing a report on animals that can jump high. What are some specific animals that have the highest leap span relative to their height/length?
demonstration:
Good question!  I’ll do my best to answer.  

 There are two main ways to measure the “jumping distance” of a human or animal.  The first way is to look at the distance a human or animal jumps from the standing position.  The second is to look at how high they jump relative to their body height or length.  

The first is quite easy.  For example, the jumping distance of humans is limited by how strong our legs and muscles are.  Our knee joint is basically built to move and to support about 20 to 30 inches of vertical jump.  We call this our “maximum jumping height”.  If we measure the height of an athlete, we’ll see that at times they’ve done more than 30 inches.  But it’s really important to remember that the height of the jump is just half of the whole measure.  

For a typical human, if we measure the length of a person’s body, we find they are usually about 5.5 feet.  Let’s call that “body height” for now.  
So the maximum jumping distance we can do will be about 10.5 feet.  This can be done only when we have a vertical jump of more than 30 inches, since half of 10.5 feet is 5.5 feet.  

Another way to measure is to do something similar to the first, but looking at how high you can jump, which is just your body height, and adding the distance of how high you jump to it.  You’d have to figure out the actual vertical jump of your body by doing some jumps in a special device which measures the exact distance of how high you jumped.  It’s really hard to do, and would require

instruction: Is it necessary to update my computer when updates are available?
demonstration: Do you need help checking that a computer needs a software update?  It depends on the circumstances of your computer.  Some computers are set up to automatically download and install software updates.  For some of those, you won’t be notified that updates are available until you check with the computer’s system settings.  It is possible that some software is not downloaded and installed automatically for security reasons.  If your computer is set up to automatically update software, you should check with your computer system’s settings to see if your computer has any updates available.  If you don’t update your computer as needed, your computer will continue to use software from an earlier version, which could lead to problems.  Also, depending on your settings, when you update your software, you may also get updates for any other software on your computer.

instruction: What happens to the human body during ketosis?
demonstration: Well it’s really hard to say.  There’s a lot of things going on!  First, a little background, you should know ketosis is a pretty common metabolic state in humans.  It’s very common during pregnancy, but people with CKD and seizures can also go into ketosis, and people who don’t eat carbs can get in ketosis if they’re fasting.  All of these situations, the natural ones as well as the deliberately induced ones, give a few shared signs.  The most important ones, as far as I can tell, are that your muscles feel stronger, you get a lot of energy, and your sense of smell is stronger.

instruction: What are the things I should do to best protect my data on my computer? Is an anti-virus enough?
demonstration:
Sure, that’s a great first step. The problem is that there are various types of data, and they might be located in different places on your computer.  What I can do is go over the most important things to look out for:

1.  Make sure you have a current antivirus.  Virus/malware definitions need to be updated frequently, because new viruses come out all the time.
2.  Be especially wary of attachments to emails that are from unknown senders.  Viruses and malware are often spread this way.
3.  Use two-factor authentication for all of your accounts on things like your email, Facebook, Google, Dropbox, etc.
4.  Create a strong, complex password for all of your accounts, and change it every couple of months.
5.  Encrypt all of your files, even your documents.
6.  Check your credit card statements regularly.
7.  Keep your home computer separate from your work computer (or phones) that you use at work.
8.  Keep your mobile phones in a separate location than your computers.
9.  Delete old versions of files if you can, like Word documents.  You can usually right-click on

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Sri Lankan dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Gotukola Sambol?
demonstration:
Sure, I can certainly try. Let me think.

So gotu kola is a herb from the Indian subcontinent that has been used in Ayurvedic medicine for thousands of years. It can also be used as a spice in cooking. It is considered to be extremely nutritious and was a source of many important nutrients for an impoverished population in Sri Lanka. It has no calories, and is high in many essential vitamins and minerals. It is a dark green leaf, about 6 inches in length.

Gotu kola has a distinct taste and aroma and a slightly bitter aftertaste. Some people enjoy this flavor in very small quantities, or others can not stand it at all.

Gotu Kola Sambol is usually made by blending gotu kola leaves with vinegar and salt, and then adding a little water. A food processor would make this process very easy.

A very common and popular side dish in Sri Lanka, gotu kola sambol is best served fresh, and it can be found in almost every Sri Lankan household. It is very healthy and is eaten with rice, chapattis, curries, vegetable dishes, and sometimes even fish or meat.

Gotu kola is usually made with the leaves of the plant only. It is always freshly ground and never stored. It is often served with a dash of salt. You can also add chilli powder or other spices to make a flavorful spicy sambol. There are even sambols flavored with cardamom and other spices that add a special flavor.

Gotu kola is a very useful plant. The leaves contain an active chemical ingredient that works as an anti-inflammatory agent, which can help relieve pain and swelling of inflamed joints, muscles and nerves. Other studies have shown that it has been shown to be effective in healing ulcers.

People also use gotu kola to reduce fever, fight stress, aid blood circulation, as well as improving memory and cognition.

Gotu kola is also used as a health tonic and to maintain good health and improve the overall appearance of the skin.

instruction: Why do some states not do daylight savings time?

instruction: When was stainless steel invented?
demonstration: Stainless steel, the modern alloy made by chemical techniques, was invented in the late 19th century by accident by two scientists, S. P. Lavoisier and H. Acheson, at the La Chaux-de-Fonds works of the Société Le Nickel in Switzerland. The workers at the factory noticed that the machine for working the iron failed to rust while the buildings next to it, made of a previous iron alloy, were rusted. Lavoisier’s assistants investigated and quickly discovered that adding nickel to the iron, while still in an alloy with carbon, inhibited the process of rusting.

instruction: Can you help me understand how lightning forms?
demonstration:
There are three main reasons for lightning:

The first is that static electricity is built up during thunderstorms.  When the sky is full of charged particles (called “ions”), the atmosphere becomes charged. When the electric field gets strong enough, electrons will move from negative to positive.  These electrons make up the cloud’s electric field, which is pushing on other electrons in the cloud and making them move.

Lightning is also caused by the flow of electric current.  When charged particles flow through a medium, they will spread out.  Once the electrons spread out into a big cloud, a lot of them will try to flow towards each other.  The movement of the electrons is what you call an electric current.

When the electric current grows really strong, there will be an electric field around it that pushes the electrons forward.  This is called a “loud” electric current.  It takes more and more energy to push the electrons forward.  Eventually, the electrons start moving forward so fast that they bump into atoms and knock other electrons loose.  These electrons also begin moving with the current, and the process continues.  This is called a “strike.”  After a little while, the electrons run out of

instruction: What are some other composers to look into if I like Benjamin Britten?
demonstration:
Rachmaninov is a favorite for many people, and many consider that his “eternal lament” in particular to be one of the best pieces in the classical repertoire.  
Prokofiev is a close contemporary of Britten, and it’s hard to listen to him and not hear Rachmaninov in his music.  He is much more driven and aggressive, though, and not as well-known as Rachmaninov.  The violin concerto he wrote for Shostakovich is a staple of many orchestras’ concerts.

Debussy is one of the giants of 20th century music, and many modern composers consider him to be an “unfair rival”.  He’s much more interesting for many people as a musician than as a composer, as he loved music so much that he often didn’t bother writing down what he heard.

Reger is much older than Britten, and was actually one of the first composers to write for the piano.  His music can sound incredibly stiff and stilted, as he was convinced that a “proper” technique was the secret to good music.  Britten has described listening to him as “scary”, so there are certainly elements of his style you can find in Britten’s work as well.  To some, Reger’s “Rhenish” pieces are the best part of his work.

Bartok is one of the best-known Hungarian composers, and he definitely shows up in Britten’s music.  Many consider him one of the great composers of the 20th century.

-------

instruction: What are some games that are similiar to Cyberpunk 2077?
demonstration:
I can start with listing the names of some games that share similar gameplay elements, but I’d rather focus on why Cyberpunk 2077 is different from other games, rather than just listing games that are similar.  These differences are particularly important because of the current political climate.  
In Cyberpunk 2077, it’s essential that players not interact with NPCs if they want to stay alive. This makes the game more challenging, as players must constantly think about how to strategically avoid the NPCs that are dangerous to them.  This is much more interesting than simply fighting an NPC, where a player’s success is mainly dependent on how strong they are, rather than how they choose to interact with an NPC.

The general story of the game is also very different from other games.  In Cyberpunk 2077, all the characters and NPCs can be easily manipulated and can be used for mutually beneficial arrangements with the players.  This makes the game more interesting, because you have more freedom to interact with NPCs and develop mutually beneficial relationships with them.  

This was a great game to play if you liked the 2017 movie, because the game feels like the movie.  The game starts with you as a prisoner in the New Angeles Police Department (NAPD).  The police just want to jail you for being a hacker.  You don’t know if there’s any justice to this, but then your

instruction: The painting of The Son of Man by Rene Magritte, is odd. Do you know it?
demonstration: I do, actually.  It’s from 1964.  Let’s see.  It shows a face with the words: C’est peut-être cela, la tragédie de l’homme — C’est qu’il ne connait pas de quoi il s’occupe. (It may be this, the tragedy of man — It’s that he doesn’t know what he’s up to).  It’s an odd painting, because it could mean that the world is meaningless or it could mean that the only tragedy is man’s ignorance.  I suppose it’s possible the latter, but the painting can be interpreted both ways.  Magritte was a surrealist artist, so his paintings often can be interpreted in multiple ways.  What were you looking for in the painting?  Why did it make you think of the “tragedy of man”?  I can also tell you that the painting was exhibited at the 1966 Rêve d’un art poétique, d’une esthétique de l’imaginaire in Brussels, Belgium.  I hope that helps!

instruction: How can I get a horse to trust me?
demonstration: Humans and horses are different species.  Horses, like many other domestic animals, tend to be wary and cautious of humans, and need to be trained and socialized.  You’ll want to start by learning how to approach and handle horses safely, by practicing with smaller and friendlier horses, and getting coaching on how to use the right equipment and safety equipment like helmets.  Then as you advance, you’ll want to work with different horses to learn what they respond to and what they don’t like.  Horses are creatures of habit and want consistency in their routines, so any effort you make to make a horse trust you will need to continue and build over time.  There’s also an additional issue, that many horses that are shown or ridden competitively are very attached to the people who have handled them, and their riders.  You might find a horse who is more friendly to humans when it’s ridden by its owner.

instruction: What should I say to someone who just suffered the loss of a love one?
demonstration: Your friend is likely grieving at the loss of the person they loved, and your friend will likely be focused on their thoughts of sadness, regret, and the future without that person.  Since you want to be helpful, I suggest saying something simple, such as “I am so sorry to hear that you are feeling sad right now.”  If your friend seems to be struggling to find something to say, I’d suggest talking about your friend’s love one and all the things they did for your friend.  Try saying something like: “You told me that you were so glad that you’d been given the opportunity to love and be loved by [name of loved one], and I

instruction: How do I practice speech with my child?
demonstration: I am not a speech therapist, but here are some exercises you could do together.  Let’s start with the “Pass the Ball” game.  Each of you will be given a rolled up piece of paper.  In front of you, I will spread out some tissue paper. You will have to pass the paper ball to each other, so that you only touch it with the tissue paper.  The other person can only touch it with the ball and the tissue paper.  I will ask you to count together from one to twenty.

instruction: I'm worried about getting heart disease when I'm older.  What exactly is heart disease?
demonstration: Heart disease is a broad term for any condition affecting your heart and arteries.  Some forms of heart disease are the main cause of heart attack and stroke.  A heart attack occurs when your heart muscle suddenly becomes injured.  The muscle cells of your heart start dying off, and you're no longer able to pump blood to your body.  If the heart muscle is not able to pump blood to your brain and other vital organs, you can end up with a stroke.  This can cause permanent brain damage or death.

instruction: Do you have any suggestions for vegan side dishes for thanksgiving?
demonstration:
The Thanksgiving tradition with turkey is usually accompanied by recipes that use a variety of vegetables. So I would suggest you consider keeping some vegan vegetable side dishes on the table.  I can give you some vegan suggestions for thanksgiving vegetables:

- Sweet Potatoes: mash them and combine with a sauce and serve.

- Vegetables: roast them with olive oil and add to a salad

- Roasted Brussel Sprouts: you can roast them by slicing off the bottoms and keeping them whole

- Roasted Mushrooms: mushrooms can be roasted on a pan with a little olive oil

- Roasted Asparagus: remove the tough ends from asparagus and then roast them

- Carrots: you can either cook them steamed in a microwave, or roast them in the oven.

- Scallions: you can sauté them in a skillet with a little olive oil

- Celery: you can add diced celery to a salad

- Spinach: blanch it in boiling water, and then let it cool, and mix it with something else.

instruction: Should I pick a doctor or a nurse practitioner?
demonstration: There is a lot of variation in quality and cost in the US for the different roles. For example, over the next 10 years a primary care doctor will cost a family around $49,000, while an NP will cost $31,000.  Generally speaking a doctor does more types of medicine, has more years of training, and is going to be harder to schedule an appointment with, whereas an NP can do a number of things a doctor can, but there will be some limitations (e.g. IV antibiotics, any kinds of surgery, things requiring a prescription for more than a short term).  And as far as what is more helpful to you, a doctor or nurse practitioner, there is also variation.  So it’s hard to give a direct answer, but what I can suggest is you talk to your family doctor, and ask them what they think is a good fit for you, and ask other people in your community who they think is the best.

instruction: What can I say to someone to stop them from letting their dog crap everywhere?

You could talk about how to train their dog to do things better, but I don’t think that’s the whole reason for the problem.  If you suspect the owner is doing this to purposefully annoy you, there’s not really much you can do about it, but you might ask them if there’s anything you could do to make things better for them, that might reduce the tension between you.

instruction: I'm always interested in being a better listener. Do you have any tips on how to be a better listener?
demonstration:
I think the most important thing is to let the speaker finish. Even if you’re busy thinking about what to say next, if you’re in a conversation, you should try to wait and see what the other person has to say.  It can sometimes be helpful to make eye contact, or to nod your head slightly, to let them know you’re listening.  Here are some other ways to be a better listener:

Let your body language mirror that of the speaker. Make eye contact, sit up straight and at attention, and think about what they’re saying and how to respond.  Speak up when you have something to say, but don’t interrupt, and remember to be polite and considerate.

instruction: Is the rate someone biologically ages closely tied to their genetics?
demonstration: The rate of aging is largely a matter of genetics, but there’s no direct connection.  Some genetic traits that influence the rate of aging are the “telomeres” at the end of our chromosomes.  These little caps of DNA influence how many times our cells can divide, and thus the overall health of our cells.  But other important traits are not related to the telomeres.

instruction: I'm trying to find out about sleep paralysis
demonstration:
Good to know! I've found out that in some cultures people believe that it's related to other phenomena like premonitions or hallucinations, and also that some people who have experienced sleep paralysis feel they've had a waking out-of-body experience. I can also find some people who've had sleep paralysis describe it in interesting ways.  

An example is this story from someone called Mindy, who wrote "I have had many experiences where I have woken up and been able to move my body and yet my mind is fully active, my eyes are open and I can move my arms but not my body, I can't speak or cry out for help. It is almost like being inside your body, but at the same time seeing what is happening from the outside. It is like you have taken a piece of yourself and put it inside of your body. You can see, but you can't talk, you can see what is happening and your body is being moved and you are unable to resist. You can see someone touching you or there are fingers touching you."

instruction: Could your provide me with some exercises I could do to strengthen my legs.
demonstration: Sure!  One simple method is the “Starfish” or “Spiderman” exercise.  To do this, you’ll want to get down on your hands and knees, then imagine that you are a starfish or spider.  Begin by curling your toes towards your shins, then curl your shins and knees towards your thighs.  You should eventually curl your body all the way over until you are resting your hands on the ground.  You may feel a stretch in your knees, or at the backs of your legs and lower back.  You can do these “curls” as many times as you like, but the good thing is that your muscles get stronger as you do this, so you can actually get better at this just by doing it!

instruction: I have to teach a child who the people are in a court. There are many different people working inside the court room, who are they? Can you help me identify them?
demonstration:
Sure, let’s take a look:

Counsels, accused, and victims:

The Prosecutor is the man who represents the people of the state or nation.

The Defendant is the person accused of committing the crime, and is the person we’re rooting for in the story.

The Prosecutor and Defendant each have their own counsel, who helps them get ready for court.

In court, the Judge, Jury, and Witness are also part of the story, and are “characters” who help drive the narrative.

Each counsel represents one person, so the Prosecutor represents the State or Nation, and the Defendant represents the person accused.

“The Victim” doesn’t exist in the court story.

The Defendant and Prosecutor both represent the other person, so their relationship is like a conflict, and they’re part of the same “side” of the story.

And the Prosecutor and Defendant’s Counsel are the guides who show them the best way to get what they want, so they’re all on the same side.

instruction: How do I get screened for cancer?
demonstration:
In order to screen for cancer, you need to get a detailed physical exam, or a diagnostic test, which is an exam that provides information on whether a specific condition is present.  To screen for cancer, there are two tests that are widely used:

-   The Pap test looks for evidence of cervical cancer, but does not diagnose cancer.  Your doctor will do a Pap test when you’re in your 20s, and will then continue to screen for cervical cancer every few years.
-   The mammogram looks for signs of breast cancer, but can’t be used to diagnose breast cancer.  A mammogram is a test that uses X-rays to look for evidence of breast cancer, and your doctor will do a mammogram as part of a routine checkup, and then more frequently if you have certain risk factors for breast cancer, such as family history.

instruction: How do I marry someone who lives in another country?
demonstration: There are legal ways to marry someone in another country, and we could look up the law in your country to see how it works. But a common solution is to live in the same country as the person you want to marry, as then you can have the same legal rights as a married couple and do everything together.  So you’d need to move somewhere to be together with your partner, and live there in a way that you think is a good compromise.  We can look up statistics to see how many people live with their spouse and whether you’d have enough support.

instruction: Can you help me to learn about some vegetarian dishes to cook on Thanksgiving? I want to be accommodating for all of my guests.
demonstration:
Sure.  I’ll try to be super helpful!  Thanksgiving is just around the corner, so I think it’s a really great time to think about preparing a meal.  So for starters, it’s important to keep in mind that cooking Thanksgiving Dinner is definitely a shared activity.  So even if you’re the one who wants to try and cook some vegetarian dishes, it’s probably a good idea to let your other guests help you in other ways, or just participate in the cooking at least a bit, even if they’re not vegetarian.  Cooking is a fun and social activity, and it really helps to keep everyone involved and happy.  

If you’re thinking about vegetarian dishes, I would also note that Thanksgiving Dinner is a time for family and friends to gather and catch up.  So while you might not want to make a big deal about what you’re serving, your guests might still have some opinions and you might not want to exclude them, even if they’re really into meat.  So it’s probably a good idea to keep some dishes you can easily switch up and that you’re willing to make more than one of, depending on who’s there.  

I’m wondering if you have some basic ideas about vegetarian recipes you might like to try, or maybe recipes that you’re just thinking about how to adjust.

instruction: How do you keep a good credit score?
demonstration: What you do in terms of keeping your credit score, is to make payments on the loans you have, and then avoid taking out new loans.   And of course keep track of all the information for your credit report.  Then if your credit score falls to a certain point, you can get it re-evaluated and try to get it improved.  If you have lots of loans, that can be hard, and the only way to really improve your score is to pay off more loans and then get new loans for other things.

instruction: I'd like to learn a bit more about black holes and how they form. Can you help me out?
demonstration: Sure, black holes are regions of space so dense that nothing, not even light, can escape from within them. Not even the most powerful telescope can detect the photons emitted by matter falling into a black hole, because they don’t reach the event horizon. The mass of a black hole can be as high as ten billion suns, and at the event horizon the gravitational field is so strong that a stone falling into the hole would have more than half the speed of light at impact.

instruction: How do I make chocolate chip cookies?
demonstration:
You can use a basic recipe:

Ingredients:

1 cup unsalted butter, softened

1 cup brown sugar

2 eggs

1 teaspoon vanilla extract

1 3/4 cups flour

1 teaspoon baking powder

1/2 teaspoon salt

1/2 teaspoon baking soda

2 cups chocolate chips

Preparation:

Heat oven to 350 degrees F. In a large bowl, cream together butter and brown sugar. Beat in eggs, one at a time, until fully incorporated. Add vanilla and beat well.

In a medium bowl, combine flour, baking powder, salt and baking soda. Stir until well combined. Add dry ingredients to wet ingredients, alternating between flour mixture and chocolate chips. 

Bake in preheated oven for 8 to 10 minutes, until a toothpick inserted in the centre of the cookies comes out clean.

instruction: How do you get rid of water bugs in your home?
demonstration: The best way to get rid of a water bug in a home is to find the source and stop it.  Once the problem is gone, the water bugs will disappear.  In homes, the most common way water bugs get into the home is when the pipes are leaking.  Water bugs enter homes through cracks in the floor and wall.  If you’ve noticed water bugs, you can try to find the source by finding a few of the bugs in the water.  If you’re already sure there is a leak, you can hire a pest control company to take care of the problem.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Panamaian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Sopa de Pata?
demonstration:
Sure, that’s a well-known dish! It’s really easy to prepare, and it’s often served as a side dish in a home setting. It’s essentially a vegetable soup, and most variations have some chicken, but you can also have it as vegetarian or vegan. Here’s a basic recipe.

Ingredients

-   3 tomatoes
-   4 carrots
-   3-4 potatoes
-   4 chicken thighs
-   3 cloves of garlic
-   1⁄2 cup of oil
-   Salt and pepper to taste

Instructions

1.  Boil all the vegetables in some water until they’re softened.
2.  Remove the chicken thighs and set them aside, making sure to remove the skin and bones.
3.  Add garlic to the chicken and allow it to simmer until the meat has softened.
4.  Chop the chicken and vegetables up and put them into a bowl.
5.  Season with salt and pepper to taste and serve with white rice or some kind of potato.

demonstration: There are many differences.  One difference I want to focus on is that in the United States, the individual has more rights than the government. In China, the government has more rights than the individual. For example, in the United States, a government can’t detain someone for years without a fair trial. China has detained a lot of political prisoners without a trial in recent years. Also, in China, the government can censor media, like news reports, books, movies, and online discussions. In the United States, the government can’t censor media. Another difference is that in the United States, there is separation of church and state, and religious beliefs can’t influence the government. In China, the government is part of the Chinese Communist Party and government leaders are also the leaders of the Chinese Communist Party, and their religious beliefs often guide their decisions.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Hong Kong  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Shengjian Mantou?
demonstration:
Sure, Shengjian Mantou are rice dumplings, where the filling has a distinctive soy sauce and garlic flavor.  There are a few different versions of this dish, depending on the ingredients and taste preference, and it seems like yours is the version that involves the soy sauce and garlic.  I can recommend this recipe, though depending on how you like it, you can adjust to taste.

While we’re on the topic of Hong Kong food, I recommend checking out Dim Sum.  The most common varieties are steamed or fried dumplings, stuffed pastries, and small bites of meat and vegetables.  The best way to try them is to eat them by wandering through various stalls, with each stall specializing in one type of Dim Sum.  It’s often pretty delicious!

And there’s a section called Chinese BBQ.  A popular dish there is called xiao long bao, or soup dumplings.  Soup dumplings are very delicate and light, and are made by wrapping pork and broth in thin, crispy pastry.

And a good hot pot is also a great way to enjoy lots of fresh ingredients at one time.

instruction: Can you tell me a little bit about the origins of the Pashto language?
demonstration: Sure, I can tell you some of the linguistic history of Pashto.  Its parent language was Proto-Indo-Iranian, an ancestor of most Indo-European languages including English.  Pashto has been spoken in the western parts of present day Afghanistan for at least the last 4500 years, and was formerly spoken in much of what is now Pakistan as well.  At one point it was considered to be a “western” language of South Asia, and could be found in an area around the river Indus.

instruction: How can I start living a more minimal lifestyle?
demonstration:
In the US, one definition of minimalism is:

Minimalism is the practice of getting rid of all the non-essentials in your life to achieve happiness. [The] word minimalist has come to be used as a synonym for "downsizing" and "simplicity."

I find your question interesting, because there is no minimalism in nature. Humans are very adaptable, and we don’t get rid of most of our traits. Even people who’ve experienced trauma, and who are sometimes called “survivors”, have healthy desires. In nature, most animals die young, and then leave no descendants.  In the natural world, we can imagine almost every animal species as having two separate populations:  parents who die and leave no descendants, and offspring who do leave descendants.  The point is, most animals have no problem with killing, and in nature animals never have more children than they can raise.  People are different, of course.

So if we are adapting to be the least “survival-oriented” animals that can survive to reproduce, we would need to leave many of our personality traits behind, which will hurt us in many ways.  A common issue here is

instruction: I bought some cologne the other day and am wondering, are men and women attracted to different smells or is this just marketing?

instruction: Good afternoon! I'm trying to find out who sang the song "Chicken Fried"
demonstration:
"Chicken Fried" is an American song from 1958 written by Homer Banks and Raymond Jackson, with popular cover versions by Johnny Cash and Ernest Tubb. Here’s more: 

According to Richard Nevins, Banks told him that “Chicken Fried” was the name of a tune that Jackson originally composed in 1939, and the two together developed it into the song they finally recorded in 1958. To complicate matters further, according to Bill Fries, Jackson composed "Chicken Fried" independently in the 1950s, but credited Banks with the song when it was recorded with the "weird spellings and a hokum meter" to make it appear to be an old blues number. When Fries spoke with Banks, Banks confirmed that Jackson had asked him to help with the lyric, but said Jackson later took full credit for the lyrics.

Here’s an alternative explanation: 

"Chicken Fried" (sometimes listed as "Chicken Fried") is an American song written by the co-writers Raymond Jackson and Homer Banks. It was a minor country music hit for Johnny Cash in 1959, reaching number 19 on the Billboard country charts. It was also recorded by Ernest Tubb.

instruction: Can you tell me how shipping companies calculate how much it is to ship packages? I wanted to ship a 2 pound package at is was over 15 dollars.
demonstration: Shipping cost is calculated by what is known as "Dimensional Weight".  Basically that means the unit size of the package.  So for example, a 2 pound package is actually 2 units of weight, so a 2 pound package has a dimensional weight of 2.  On the other hand, a package that is 2x2x2 inches is 1 unit of dimensional weight.  So 2x2x2 is actually 1 dimensional weight, or 1 unit of weight. instruction: Why didn't people treat cigarette smoke as poisonous back in the old days?
demonstration: That is an interesting question. Tobacco is just one of many plants that have ever been considered to have a number of medical uses, and one of the reasons it became such a popular plant for smoking is that it is less likely to cause people harm than many other plants.  You could say that we have both the government and the people around us to blame.  As it became more socially accepted for women to wear corsets, they found that the corset itself would make it hard for them to breathe.  This might not have been immediately obvious, however, and once women started wearing the corset, doctors had a hard time finding other ways for them to treat the same issues.  Doctors also saw benefits in tobacco smoking for people with respiratory problems like asthma, which is why it was recommended as a treatment.  In some ways, people were discovering health benefits to a product before they understood the harms, and it was often hard for doctors to find alternative treatments that they were able to prescribe.

instruction: Can you explain to me what the "uncanny valley" refers to?
demonstration: Sure! I’m happy to help. I think you’re referring to this psychological theory, that describes a phenomenon wherein a robot or robot-like object begins to be more attractive to a human observer as it becomes increasingly more like a human. But eventually, once a robot has evolved into a humanoid form, the human observer begins to notice traits that are not yet human, which leads to a sense of “un-human-ness” or dissonance, and they become repulsed.  The “uncanny valley” is the point on the “human-likeness scale” where this effect happens.

instruction: Why do leaves change color in the fall?
demonstration:
Autumn is a part of the seasonal change that is caused by the earth moving from its summer position to its winter position in its orbit around the sun.  The turning of the earth also moves the sun and the earth away from one another, causing the days and nights to get longer and shorter. This is a major cue for plants to prepare for winter and die off.  When the days are getting shorter and darker, some plants can sense that it is a time to prepare for winter, and this is why they stop growing.  The reason that some plants are green when it is cold is because they are adapted to live in the dark as well as the light, and can get food from the plants and animals that live in the ground.  
The yellowing of leaves is due to a process called chlorosis, and is when the green color of the leaves fades, causing it to be yellow instead.  Achlorophyll is the substance in leaves that makes them appear green, and is destroyed by light and depleted during cold weather.  Chlorophyll is also destroyed when there is not enough nitrogen in the soil, and this can be a problem when a plant is growing too quickly.

instruction: What is the difference between a KN95 mask and an N95 mask?
demonstration: The names of these masks refer to how effective they are at blocking particulate matter.  The KN95 (K for Korea) are made in Korea and have a filtering efficiency of 95%. If you can get your hands on either of these masks I would recommend them.  In general, there is a tradeoff between comfort and breathing resistance.  Faceshields can fit tightly to the face and restrict airflow.  Respirators can be more comfortable and breathable, but less effective at blocking the passage of particles.

instruction: I've heard that women prefer chocolate and men prefer eating meat. Is there a scientific reason for this?
demonstration:
The two phenomena aren’t necessarily linked. I don’t know of any research or studies that prove men and women's preferences for certain flavors are different because of evolutionary pressures that favored those preferences for purposes of reproduction. But it’s possible for psychology or psychology-related mechanisms to give rise to such preferences.

This is a complicated issue, and the reason why is because we evolved to desire the foods our ancestors ate, but we also have a drive to desire anything that’s new and exciting.  It’s very common for people’s interests and desires to be influenced by the things they see others in their culture like and doing.  I won’t go into it in much detail, but this might be a product of an evolutionary past where different tribes all had different and often-unique food sources, and the more foods a tribe consumed, the more likely they would be to survive.

instruction: My waterproof jacket shell keeps wetting out. Is this normal?

Some simple things you could try would be: moving your jacket from a darker color fabric to one that’s a more natural-looking gray or off-white, or reducing the amount of thick synthetic insulation in your jacket, or layering a thin synthetic jacket over a thicker jacket. instruction: What time of the year do caterpillars turn into butterflies?
demonstration: It’s dependent on the kind of butterfly, I’m afraid.  If you’d like a general answer, it’s a result of changes in temperature and availability of food.  A caterpillar usually munches on leaves, so when the leaves stop being available, they change to another type of food, like tree sap.  Then it stops munching for a while and hangs out in its pupa, or chrysalis.  And then when the weather gets warm, the caterpillar becomes a butterfly, and flies around looking for food, or a mate, or to lay its eggs.

instruction: How cold does it get in Alaska?
demonstration: That’s a difficult question, because temperature is only one factor, along with wind, humidity, and other weather variables.  It’s also important to remember that “cold” can be a relative concept, in the sense that some humans would actually find these conditions quite comfortable.  Even in the winter, the sun will sometimes be shining, and a person can still see and hear birds and other animals outside, but they don’t appear to be bothered by the weather.  There is always wind, too, and it’s not so much the cold that’s uncomfortable, but the wind chill.  In that sense, it’s difficult to give a single temperature number, because it’s so hard to describe to a human what temperature would be “comfortable”.  But if we want to talk about the human-comfortable temperature, I think a good rule of thumb would be about 60 degrees Fahrenheit (or 15 degrees Celsius).

instruction: Can you help me to understand why the sunset time changes every day?
demonstration: Sure.  The earth spins on its axis every 24 hours, which creates the appearance of the sun circling around the earth once per day.  The angle of the sun at sunset is related to the earth’s distance from the sun, which is fixed.  However the direction of the sun relative to the earth is determined by the time of day, and the time of day changes every 24 hours.  And so the sun will always set along the same path, but its direction will be different every day.

instruction: What do you know about the empire state building?

instruction: I have an infection and I'm coughing up green phlegm. What are these symptoms of?

instruction: I just got a pool and want to throw a pool party. Can you give me tips?
demonstration:
Sure, a pool party is a lot of fun, so here are some helpful tips for your party:

-Provide plenty of towels, and other things to help people dry off after they swim.

-Offer lots of food, and set it up in a way that helps people easily choose what they’d like to eat.

-Keep the party going by throwing a small party every so often.

-If you know a lot of people, just have some people bring food and drinks, and make it easier for everyone to get everything they need.

-Have a lot of activities for people to do. There are lots of things you can try. Some options: playing games like volleyball, or having people play music for people to dance to.

-You could have some fun things, like putting on a movie, or having a bonfire.

-If you have a pool and plenty of room, have people bring their own water toys and flotation devices to the party. It’s a fun way to make the pool more fun for everyone.

-If you’re interested in playing, you can throw a mini-golf course in your backyard, or build a shack for some fun games.

-The pool is a nice place to relax and cool off after playing a game. You can provide lots of comfortable things to sit on, and drink on, like coolers or chairs and tables.

-You can have an outdoor kitchen if you don’t want people to have to cook at the party.

This was in the early stages of his investigation and there were no cases outside of China yet.  
Then a person visited the Huanan seafood market in Wuhan in late January.  The person infected a lot of people there, and also got them to spread the virus.  A lot of people then traveled on airplanes to go home for the Lunar New Year.  
This is the original source of the outbreak.  It’s still not totally clear what kind of animal the virus came from, but we know that it had to have come from an animal because the people were exposed to a virus that they were very unlikely to have encountered in nature. instruction: Hi, I'm making pumpkin pie for this Thanksgiving dinner, or I'm supposed to. Can you give me a good recipe so that I can do it well?
demonstration:
Sure! Do you have access to pumpkin? If so, I would recommend this recipe. Here it is:

8 oz (226 g) pumpkin (approximately 1 medium to large squash)

4 eggs

1 1/2 cups (300 ml) light brown sugar

2 teaspoons (10 ml) pumpkin pie spice

1 1/2 teaspoons (7 ml) cinnamon

1/2 cup (120 ml) butter, melted

1 cup (240 ml) light corn syrup

1 cup (240 ml) evaporated milk

For the crust:

2 cups (500 ml) flour

1 1/2 teaspoons (7 ml) cinnamon

1/4 teaspoon (1 ml) salt

1 cup (240 ml) butter, chilled

1/3 cup (80 ml) shortening

1 teaspoon (5 ml) baking soda

3/4 teaspoon (4 ml) baking powder

1/4 cup (60 ml) chilled water

Preparation:

Preheat oven to 350°F (180°C, gas mark 4). Line a 9 x 11-inch (23 x 28 cm) baking pan with parchment paper.

Peel, seed, and dice pumpkin; set aside.

Make the crust: Mix together the flour, cinnamon, and salt. Cut in the butter and shortening until the mixture is crumbly.

Add the baking soda and baking powder. Mix in the water until it forms a dough.

Roll out the dough on a floured surface to form a 10 x 15-inch (25 x 38 cm) rectangle. Transfer the crust to the baking pan.

Top crust with the pumpkin, spreading it evenly to fill the pan.

Make the filling: Cream together the eggs, brown sugar, pumpkin pie spice, and cinnamon.

Mix in the butter and corn syrup.

Pour the mixture over the pumpkin in the crust.

Bake for 40 to 50 minutes, until the top is golden brown and the filling is set.

Cool for at least 10 minutes.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Sardinian dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Pecora in cappotto?
demonstration:
Here’s one recipe I found online:

Pecora in cappotto (goat meat in a cloak)

Ingredients
•	Goat meat (a large amount)
•	Cotechino sausage
•	Carrots
•	Onions
•	Rosemary
•	Garam Masala

Method

1.	Put in large pot or crockpot, enough water to just cover the meat.
2.	Put the meat in the pot, but no carrots or onions.
3.	When the water boils, remove the meat.
4.	Add carrots, onions, the cotechino sausage, a little rosemary, a few grinds of garam masala, and plenty of salt and pepper.
5.	Put back in the water, and let it cook.  You can stir it occasionally, but don’t disturb the cooking process too much.
6.	About two hours later, remove the meat from the water, cut it into chunks, and set it aside.  Cook another hour.
7.	The meat should be a nice orange color, and the vegetables should be soft.
8.	Serve with side dishes or with a piece of bread.  No cheese is necessary.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some Hong Kong  dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Baozi?
demonstration:
Sure, I’ll give you some options. Here’s a simple boiled baozi recipe:

Ingredients:

- Baozi Dough (makes about 10 baozi):

+ 500g of flour + 3g of salt + 125ml of warm water

- Stuffing ingredients (can vary for the different types of baozi)

+ meat: beef, pork, chicken, tofu, seafood (any of these options can be used for vegetarian baozi as well)

+ veggies: onion, garlic, spring onion, carrot, lotus root, gai lan (any of these options can be used for vegetarian baozi as well)

+ sauce ingredients: soy sauce, oyster sauce, peanut sauce, brown sauce

- seasoning

+ salt

+ pepper

+ chili

+ other (if desired, add any spice or spice mix of your liking)

+ cooking ingredients: oil, water

Method:

Prepare the stuffing ingredients and sauce.

Cook the meat, vegetables, and seasoning.

Add stuffing ingredients and sauce into the dough to make the baozi.

instruction: I have trouble sleeping because of restless leg syndrome. Can you help me understand it a little better?

It’s not a disorder that happens suddenly, but you often notice it when you’re trying to fall asleep. demonstration: Garri is an African dish from Nigeria. It is made from cassava. Garri is made by putting cassava roots in water and boiling them for a long time to create a dense porridge. The porridge is then mashed to produce thick flakes, and then the flakes are put through a grater to make what looks like flour, with flakes in it. Then the flour is added to water or soup and cooked.  The type of cassava used to make garri varies between families, but there is a traditional standard that can be found in the markets, and is usually labeled "Garri flour".

instruction: Is using the microwave harmful?
demonstration: Using a microwave oven has some pros and cons, though I’m no doctor and can’t prescribe medical advice.  On the plus side, microwaves are a quick and easy way to warm food and are frequently the recommended method.  However, microwaves are also a source of radiation which may be harmful over long periods of time.  One issue is that it’s hard to know how much radiation a person is being exposed to, since the microwave’s radiation strength varies according to the wattage.  As a general rule, the human body has a higher concentration of water and fat, so radiation can penetrate deeper and cause more damage, though it’s also more difficult to precisely measure since food absorbs much of the radiation.

instruction: How can I paint a sunset with watercolors?
demonstration: First you would have to make a sunset, and that is a little tricky, but I think you could use these instructions.  Then you would have to mix your watercolors, which is simple.  Then you would need to apply the paint to a paper, that’s also pretty easy.  Then you would need to let the watercolor dry, which can take a while.  Once it’s dry, you can paint a sky above the sunset, which is again fairly easy.  Then you can apply more watercolor to the paper, so that the sky and the sunset blend together, which is where you run into some problems.  For example, you’d have to carefully add more and more watercolor until the watercolor overpowers the sky, but not the sunset, or vice-versa.  Another problem is that if you add too much watercolor, you might accidentally paint over your sunset.

instruction: I like to host guests at my home from time to time, and I am gathering  recipes of different dishes and drinks to keep things interesting. I am interested in trying some  Thai dishes. Can you give me a recipe for Pad Thai?
demonstration:
Sure, here you go:

Ingredients:

• 2 cups rice noodles, broken in half

• 2 tablespoons vegetable oil

• 2 tablespoons peanut butter

• 1 tablespoon oyster sauce

• 1 teaspoon fish sauce

• 1 teaspoon lime juice

• 2 tablespoons fresh or canned bamboo shoots, cut into thin strips

• 1⁄2 cup chopped scallions

• 1 egg, lightly beaten

• 1⁄2 cup cilantro, chopped

• 2 cups cooked crabmeat

• 2 cups cooked shredded chicken

Procedure:

1. Cook noodles in boiling water until tender. Drain and set aside.

2. In a medium-size bowl, combine peanut butter, oyster sauce, fish sauce, lime juice, bamboo shoots, and scallions. Add beaten egg and stir well to blend. Add noodles, and toss gently until evenly coated.

3. Place noodles on a serving platter and top with crabmeat and chicken. Garnish with cilantro.

instruction: Can you tell me some history of Bill Gates?
demonstration: OK!  Bill Gates is the richest person in the world, and founder of Microsoft. He was born in Seattle Washington in 1955, and was adopted. He went to Harvard, then started Microsoft in 1975.  The company became the most valuable in the world in the 1990s, which was also when the company began its anti-competitive ways.  After that, he was indicted by the US government for monopolistic behavior, though he was never convicted.  He retired in 2013, but he still owns the company.  Other things you might want to know about Bill Gates include:  he is married, and has four children, he is an advocate for education, he is a member of the Bill and Melinda Gates Foundation, he loves cars and flying, and he used to be overweight.

instruction: Can you tell me a bit about the history of exorcisms?
demonstration: Sure, it’s been a central element of many religions, cultures, and even political movements. In Ancient Greece, Apollo was often credited with possessing the ability to drive out evil spirits.  In the Middle Ages, holy men, such as the Cistercians, performed exorcisms regularly.  Catholics still practice exorcisms, sometimes in a medical context.  At times, exorcists have claimed that religious officials from other denominations have cast evil spirits out of humans, even though they’re not qualified to do so, which is called “religious desecration”.

instruction: What is an EIN?
demonstration:
An EIN, or Employer Identification Number, is a number that employers have to register.  It’s actually one part of a federal law called the E-Verify law, which was passed in the 1990s. 

It’s a complicated system, with many rules, but basically the idea is that when a US citizen hires a new employee, they have to ask the person whether they’ve ever been employed in a job where they might have hired illegal immigrants.  The employer can only then hire someone with an EIN if they’ve answered “yes” to that question.

instruction: How long does it take to get profecient at mountain climbing?
demonstration:
Well, that depends on your starting point, and also on your individual abilities. I would say that “proficient” would be somewhere on the following continuum:

(0, 1 year, novice)
(1, 1-3 years, journeyman)
(2-5, 1-3 years, professional)
(6-20, 5 years, expert)
(50, 1 year, guru)

In the first few months, you’ll just be learning about how to climb and how to deal with the basic physical challenges. In the next few years, you’ll learn to navigate and make your way through the mountains, making your own way and following routes. Over time, you’ll learn to read the terrain and do complicated moves and to pull off new tricks that you’ll remember and be able to do automatically. After 5 years, you’ll have mastered the major challenges of mountaineering and have developed a deep understanding of the entire subject. You’ll be so confident and good at climbing that it will feel instinctive, and you’ll feel comfortable anywhere you find yourself. At this point, you’ll also be capable of understanding and recreating classic climbs from the past and

instruction: How do I take care of an aloe plant?
demonstration: Aloe is a succulent plant that grows from the desert regions of the southwestern United States. It is a plant that has medicinal properties and has been grown for thousands of years. The sap from the aloe plant can be made into an ointment or gel and has been used to treat sunburns and other burns for thousands of years. It can also be taken orally as a liquid, or mixed with water and taken as a tea. It is most often used to treat burns, although it can also be used to treat other skin conditions and help reduce the appearance of acne scars. For example, if you get sunburned, you can take a couple of tablespoons of aloe vera gel and rub it on your sunburn. Then you should rinse off the excess gel and pat your skin dry.

instruction: What are the arguments for and against "stand your ground" laws in the united states?
demonstration:
Here is a starting point:

The Stand Your Ground law is essentially a “self defense” law.  At the core of the law is a legal principle called the “Castle Doctrine”.  Under that principle, it is legal to defend one’s property from intruders, even if the intruders are unarmed.  This makes sense, because property is an investment, and if you own it you should be able to preserve it from criminals.  

The Stand Your Ground law extends that principle to defense of yourself as well, though there are some restrictions on when you can use deadly force.  Specifically, it should only be used in “life-threatening situations” that happen in public.  And in some cases, you should avoid using deadly force even if it means you risk being harmed yourself.  That’s because using deadly force creates a much larger problem than the initial threat: the death of another human.

instruction: Can you help me understand how lightning forms?
demonstration:
There are three main reasons for lightning:

The first is that static electricity is built up during thunderstorms.  When the sky is full of charged particles (called “ions”), the atmosphere becomes charged. When the electric field gets strong enough, electrons will move from negative to positive.  These electrons make up the cloud’s electric field, which is pushing on other electrons in the cloud and making them move.

Lightning is also caused by the flow of electric current.  When charged particles flow through a medium, they will spread out.  Once the electrons spread out into a big cloud, a lot of them will try to flow towards each other.  The movement of the electrons is what you call an electric current.

When the electric current grows really strong, there will be an electric field around it that pushes the electrons forward.  This is called a “loud” electric current.  It takes more and more energy to push the electrons forward.  Eventually, the electrons start moving forward so fast that they bump into atoms and knock other electrons loose.  These electrons also begin moving with the current, and the process continues.  This is called a “strike.”  After a little while, the electrons run out of

instruction: Is it ethical to go to watch an orca show?
demonstration:
To put it simply, no.  If you’re referring to Orca Productions, then they specifically say they aren’t an educational organization, they exist to entertain and amuse.  And as such, they use and display Orcas in ways that are, from a biological perspective, not very good for Orcas.

For example, their orcas swim in a large, open tank, with a large pool in the middle, as you can see on the photos.  As an orca, you wouldn’t be able to choose where to go, or decide how you want to use your time.  There’s no way to choose whether to swim or float or play or whatever, because you’re in a pool with no escape route, and the others orcas are driving you out of your territory.  Because of this, you can also see the inherent issues with Orca and human relationship, which is one of the underlying ideas of the show.  If orcas were free, they would not accept the tank.

instruction: Can you explain the traits of astrological signs?
demonstration:
Sure, here are some thoughts about the Zodiac.  Astrologers believe the sun’s motion relative to the stars in our night sky has an effect on our individual characters, and that we’re each inclined in different ways, and also in a cycle, to different traits.  They measure this by “Signs” of the Zodiac.  They are named for the constellations of stars that the sun is believed to “align with” at the time of our birth.  This is an approximation; the exact time of birth will also affect the signs we are said to be most aligned with.  Here are some popular characteristics of the signs, and some things that are particularly well-represented among them.  

Aries:  On the surface, there’s a lot of surface energy, ambition, an outgoing and exuberant personality, and this can also make Aries people more assertive.  There can also be a tendency to be impatient and impatient and it can also be tough to deal with the amount of negative feedback that some Aries people can generate.  

Taurus:   Taurus people are hard-working and practical, and are especially inclined to use their resources wisely and avoid waste.  Taurus people are very attached to things they value, and have a tendency to be fairly sensual.  They can also be very stubborn.  

Gemini:  Gemini people are clever, and often can be quick to learn new things.  They have a way of getting along with everyone, and often think of themselves as well, and often seek a certain amount of status and notoriety.  

Cancer:  Cancer people have a strong instinct for home and family, and there can be a tendency to overvalue and become attached to things.  They can also be a bit vulnerable, and sometimes find their feeling of safety and security threatened.  They can also be very protective of people they love.  

Leo:  Leo people are proud and individualistic, and can sometimes be a little too proud of themselves.  They’re also very proud of their families and sometimes jealous.  

Virgo:  Virgo people are detail-oriented and organized, and also sometimes are self-doubting.  They have a way of being critical and of taking things too seriously.  

Libra:  Libra people are thoughtful and open-minded, and tend to think about relationships and fairness quite a bit.  There can also be a tendency to be a little indirect and goofy.  

Scorpio:  Scorpio people have a way of being intensely and intensely sexual, and also very focused.  There can also be a tendency for Scorpios to be a little manipulative.  

Sagittarius:  Sagittarius people are outgoing, smart, and love to explore and take risks.  They also are quite idealistic.  

Capricorn:  Capricorn people are focused on the business world, and tend to be somewhat practical and conservative, and have a way of very clearly prioritizing their goals.  

Aquarius:  Aquarius people are very interested in the future, and also very open-minded and idealistic.  There can also be a tendency for them to be a little ungrounded, and to be detached from things they value.  

Pisces:  Pisces people have a way of being philosophical and introspective, and also sensitive, and have a way of being very creative.  There can also be a tendency to be lazy.

instruction: How do I teach my daughter how to multiply numbers?
demonstration:
For multiplication of 2-digit numbers, the steps are:

    *  Start with the easiest case: Numbers where the right-hand digit is less than or equal to the left-hand digit. For example, 6 × 2 is 10, so that number would be the “answer”.
    *  For numbers where the right-hand digit is bigger than the left-hand digit, that means the left-hand digit times itself (either 2 times the left-hand digit, or the right-hand digit multiplied by itself) would be too small, so we take off the left-hand digit, multiply by the right-hand digit, and add that number to the number we had previously. For example, for 4 × 2, we first calculate 4 × 2, which is 8, then 8 plus 4, which is 12, so the answer is 12.
    *  The basic strategy for multiplication of numbers with multiple digits on each side can be to start by writing the largest number of digits you need to make on each side, and see if you can use some of the steps above, but this will likely result in much more complicated steps.

instruction: Could you give me some tips on training my dog how to use the bathroom on indoor pet pads?
demonstration: Sure! We can train your dog to use the bathroom on the indoor pet pads using what is called operant conditioning. This is basically like setting up a reward system for the dog, and then rewarding it for something that it’s doing, and then gradually increasing the reward for that behavior. So in your case, you would want to choose the reward that is most desirable to your dog. You might like to consider using food as a reward, as this will teach the dog that it will get the reward if it urinates in the right place.

instruction: Hi! My dog keeps begging for food and I need help to try to put a stop to this behaviour
demonstration: Hm, I wonder if maybe you should not use the word “begging” when referring to the dog.  In fact I think it’s important for animals to have a sense of belonging and purpose, and if a person’s pet is bored, they can act out by begging for attention, and it may be beneficial to the dog to allow them to do so occasionally.  But the pet may also be disobedient, so you may need to work with it to remind it what the boundaries are.  What I’d suggest is to allow the dog to eat at a designated time, and give it lots of time to exercise and play.  The goal is for it to eventually settle in on a routine that is healthy and satisfying.

instruction: Why is the Iraq War considered a failed war?
demonstration:
There are many reasons, and most of them are documented by media, military experts, historians, and so on.   Here are three:

1.  Death toll.   This doesn’t tell you anything about the “win” or “loss” of a war, but a high death toll is generally considered an indicator of a failed war.

2.  Amount of oil production lost.  Saddam’s Iraq was a particularly bad actor, not just because of his invasions, but also because he cut the flow of oil production in retaliation against sanctions and also refused to allow inspections.  This caused the price of oil to spike.

3.  Terrorism growth in the Middle East.  This is connected to the reasons above, but it’s worth noting that the rise of terrorism in the Middle East occurred after the fall of Saddam.

instruction: Will quantum computers rely on traditional programming languages such as C and Python?
demonstration: An entire system of theoretical approaches, also referred to as “quantum computing”, is designed to exploit the fundamental nature of quantum mechanics in computation. That said, these methods are still at an early stage of development, and as of today are only minimally applicable to practical computational problems. For that reason, quantum computers will not rely on traditional programming languages, but will rely on languages which are specifically designed for quantum computers. Such languages can be thought of as the hardware of the computer, and are a crucial part of how computers are programmed.

instruction: Someone gave me a bamboo plant as a gift. How do I take care of it?
demonstration: You can help the plant in many different ways! For example, you can give the plant some fresh water every day to keep it hydrated, as well as use a soft cloth to wipe dust off of the leaves.  You can also provide sunlight for the plant to help it grow, which can be accomplished by moving the plant to a window or outside!  You should be sure to leave some room for the plant to expand, as it will grow with time.

instruction: What are the requirements for getting a security deposit refund on an apartment lease?
demonstration:
Oh, no problem at all, I’m glad you asked! Here is how to process a refund for a security deposit at a Seattle apartment:

1) Make sure you get an occupancy agreement from your landlord (not a lease).

2) Make sure you get a written refund from the apartment owner, in the form of a note from your landlord, or their attorney, stating that your lease has been paid off, and the apartment is officially vacant.

3) Open a tenant security deposit claim through the city’s landlord-tenant division, as an unaccompanied minor. Fill out a CSC-1 form.

4) You should expect a refund within 30 days.

instruction: How do you treat a cold sore?
demonstration: For minor symptoms such as itching or discomfort, over-the-counter remedies like lysine, calamine lotion, or petroleum jelly can provide relief. I’ve also seen a few other remedies used. A paste made from chamomile flowers or the juice of a raw onion can both be applied directly to the area to provide temporary relief. Pomegranate juice can be applied to the sore by swabbing a cotton ball soaked in the juice directly onto the sore. A traditional remedy for oral herpes includes soaking the area in warm water for a few minutes, or applying a hot compress of an oil, such as sesame, olive, or coconut oil, which can reduce itchiness.

instruction: What types of illnesses could be caused by being overweight?
demonstration: There are many causes of illness, and most can be prevented by healthy living. Obesity is one of these. When a person gains weight, their heart has to work harder to pump blood around the body. This puts a strain on the heart, and can lead to heart disease and heart failure. Obesity can also lead to diabetes. Diabetes is when a person’s body has a hard time making or using insulin, and this makes the person feel tired and weak. Gaining weight can also make a person put on weight around the stomach and increase the risk of developing gallstones, kidney stones, high blood pressure, and osteoarthritis. It can also increase the risk of developing certain cancers and mental health problems such as depression, eating disorders, and stress.

instruction: I want  to teach someone verb tenses. Can you explain to me the different kinds of verb tenses that exist?
demonstration:
Sure. There are many different tenses of verbs, some more common than others. Here are a few basic examples:  
Present: “I go to the store.”
Present progressive: “I am going to the store.”
Present perfect: “I have gone to the store.”
Past simple: “I went to the store.”

instruction: The neighbor's kid has a peanut allergy.  How dangerous is that.
demonstration: Peanut allergies can be really bad, sometimes they’re life-threatening and people need to get an EpiPen to stop anaphylaxis. But I think there are some medications that people with peanut allergies can take to reduce the risk of life-threatening reactions.  To really be safe, we’d recommend that the kid be taught to recognize and avoid any foods with peanuts or any foods that have been made with peanut oil.  The whole family should be taught to be careful about what kind of food they share, and always watch for signs of anaphylaxis.

instruction: Can you explain to me how wine is made?
demonstration: Sure!  There are a few ways to make wine, but the common ones are similar.  They boil the grape skins and seeds, then let it sit for several months, while the “yummy” alcohol components evaporate out.  A little bit of sugar is sometimes added to speed up the process.  Then it’s allowed to age in oak barrels for a year or more.  It can be a messy process.

instruction: How do I make a balloon arch?
demonstration: Go to a party store and buy some red or pink balloons.  Find some pliers or tweezers to make a small hole near the bottom.  Tie the end of a string (or a long shoelace) to the balloon and knot it.  Position the string up near the ceiling so it’s stretched taut.  Now get some thick cardboard.  Take your pliers and make a long incision along the edge of the cardboard.  Using the string from the balloon, tie the end of the cardboard around the string.  Now slowly and carefully pull the cardboard down to the floor.  The balloon will form a great big red or pink arch.  This is a brilliant party trick.

instruction: Can you help me learn some information about Woodrow Wilson?
demonstration: Oh, Woodrow Wilson is a really interesting person!  He was the 28th President of the United States and is sometimes called “The Father of the American Middle Class” because he supported raising the wages of working people, and this was a very progressive and progressive thing to do in that time period.  He also established the Federal Reserve and created the Federal Trade Commission.  As President, he was also strongly pro-League of Nations, which was an organization with the goal of keeping the peace in Europe, and he also led the US into World War 1, which is important because it helped bring an end to WWI, which is also a very important accomplishment, because WW1 had been happening for almost two years already, and the US hadn’t entered the war yet.  In the 1920s, he was awarded the Nobel Peace Prize for helping to bring about peace in Europe.  What else?  Oh, he was also friends with Margaret Sanger, who was a feminist and an advocate of birth control, and she also made sure that contraception was available to poor women through her organization, Planned Parenthood, which is also a very important accomplishment.  And he was also very involved in politics during the Progressive Era.

instruction: What can you do with top soil?
demonstration: Top soil is soil that is rich in organic matter, which means it’s not very suitable for growing crops.  It’s best used to make compost, which is a mixture of decomposing organic matter that’s used to fertilize plants.  It’s also used to condition soils, which is when the top layer of soil is added to the bottom layer, and the dirt becomes more balanced and rich in nutrients.  The organic matter used for compost is usually made from yard waste, such as leaves, pine needles, and branches.  There are a variety of ways to make compost, including stacking the organic matter in a pile and adding water to let it decompose naturally, or using a heat source to speed up the process.

instruction: Please tell me about Thanksgiving Day and the history behind it?
demonstration: Thanksgiving was created as a day to celebrate after a successful harvest. The United States Thanksgiving holiday is held on the fourth Thursday of November. The first Thanksgiving was celebrated in 1621 in Plymouth. It was the English settlers’ first successful harvest in the New World. It became an annual tradition, and every president since Abraham Lincoln has declared a national Thanksgiving holiday. It is celebrated as a time of giving thanks and spiritual reflection. Thanksgiving is a cultural holiday which marks the beginning of the autumn harvest season. The most widely celebrated American holiday, it is observed on the fourth Thursday of November by families and friends coming together to share a traditional meal.

instruction: What is kidney failure?

instruction: What kind of requirements are needed for land travel between the US and Mexico?
demonstration: It’s often stated that to go by car from the US to Mexico, you need to have a valid US driver’s license and a car that is properly registered in the US.  This is because a car can often be in one country for some period of time without being officially registered there.  And also it can take months to get a proper license in Mexico, which involves testing in Spanish and passing a few exams in Mexican law.  If you have a car that is registered in the US, you can drive it anywhere in the US and will not be stopped, because it will say “US” in the registration sticker.  You can drive across the border into Mexico and do not need a special permit to cross the border, because you are going to a place where the vehicle can legally stay.  If you want to go anywhere in Mexico, you’ll also need to show your passport to the border police, which is what you’ll use to fly on a plane.  Since there are very different laws for owning cars in the US and Mexico, you’ll need to check those laws and make sure that it is legally possible for you to own a car in Mexico and to drive it. instruction: Curious to know where sangria comes from, the history of it
demonstration: Sangria is a combination of wine and fruit juices (typically peach, pineapple, apple, and orange), sometimes with a splash of brandy. The concept of mixing wine and fruit came from Spain, when Pedro Ximenez grape growers needed to remove the excess liquid from their grapes, so they would mix it with fruit and water to create a drink called sherry. Eventually, other fruit juices and juices from other fruits were added, and the drink became sangria. Many recipes can be found online, from simple fruit mixes to complex and sophisticated cocktails.

instruction: When was deodorant first invented?

Other sources say that Frederick Walters used a combination of vegetable oils, perfume, and charcoal as a deodorant around 1890. However, Walters' claims are challenged by J. I. Scherer, who reported in 1895 that he had improved upon Walters’ process for "the purification and concentration of oils", and that the process "was used to deodorize body and underclothing".
